title: llm-d — K8s-native KV Cache Indexer
summary_zh: Red Hat/IBM/Google 的 Kubernetes 原生分散式推理。全域 KV-Cache Indexer 的 Precise Prefix-Cache Scorer，87.4% cache 命中率、88% 更快 TTFT。Session affinity 防止多輪 agent 的 cache thrashing。v0.5 新增 cache-aware LoRA routing。
summary_en: Kubernetes-native distributed inference by Red Hat/IBM/Google. Global KV-Cache Indexer with Precise Prefix-Cache Scorer, 87.4% cache hit rate, 88% faster TTFT. Session affinity prevents cache thrashing for multi-turn agents. v0.5 adds cache-aware LoRA routing.
